commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-off top-level tools.web.fetch.allowPrivateNetwork config key, threads it through web_fetch SSRF/cache handling, adds IMDS hard-block tests, updates config metadata/types, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main's strict web_fetch schema lacks a broad private-network key, and runtime forwarding only includes the two narrow fake-IP SSRF flags. I did not run a live private-network fetch in this read-only review.
